title: Shot Diagram Timing Sequence Mode
notes: Adds Timing Sequence Mode to the Shot Diagram with a manually chosen row starting time and interval.
A row start of 0 with interval 25 produces 0, 25, 50, 75, 100; resetting the next row start to 42 produces 42, 67, 92, 117.
Tap or click saved holes to apply the current Next Time and automatically advance by the interval.
Shift-click a saved hole on a desktop to fill every eligible saved hole in that row, left-to-right or right-to-left.
Mobile and desktop users can select holes, rows, columns, or a page through Edit Holes and use Fill Timing Sequence.
Includes Set Row Start, Back/Advance Interval, Reset to Start, timing-specific Undo, blank-only or overwrite handling, and an active Timing Fill indicator.
Dirt and bad holes are skipped. Timing values remain ordinary hole Timing data and continue to export through existing PDF, CSV, and JSON workflows.
Preserves Physical Keyboard mode, Touch Keypad mode, dual shot volumes, patterns, selections, GPS, conditions, themes, PDF navigation, and offline support.
